remaining_tasks.name: Checkpoint: User provisions cloud and deploys Phase A
remaining_tasks.progress: Cloud resources provisioned, need to deploy application

decisions.decision: Use Lighthouse + Lighthouse DB instead of CVM + CDB
decisions.rationale: PM recommended CVM but user bought Lighthouse DB from promo; Lighthouse ecosystem shares VPC automatically, no CCN needed
Lighthouse DB was created in Guangzhou, so COS and server must match
Lighthouse DB promo only had 5.7; Prisma supports both, no impact
No domain yet, WeChat OAuth requires domain, dev login bypasses for IP access

next_action: Clone repo on server, create backend/.env with all credentials, build frontend, run docker compose up to deploy Phase A
context_notes: Phase 16 execute-phase is at Wave 2, Plan 16-03, Task 3 (checkpoint). Plans 16-01 and 16-02 are complete (Dockerfiles, nginx config, docker-compose.prod.yml, auth fixes). All cloud resources are now provisioned and verified. The next step is the actual deployment: clone repo to server, configure .env, build and deploy with Docker. All credentials are stored in memory/project_server_access.md.
